_comment: C1 verdict-contract override map. The efficacy ledger (tools/gate_efficacy_ledger.py) and the held-out split (tools/gate_eval_splits.py) classify every validator/eval into {domain, dimension} by a deterministic heuristic. When the heuristic mis-tags one, correct it here and re-run `python tools/gate_efficacy_ledger.py reclassify`. Human override always wins.
_format: Inside "overrides": "<validator-or-eval-id>": {"domain": "general|saas|ai", "dimension": "usability|functionality|adaptability|internal_control|safety|cost"}  OR the shorthand "domain/dimension"  OR just "domain" (dimension stays heuristic). A flat top-level map (no wrapper) is also accepted.
